page_content:
Formerly: BMGT788A.

EMBA789 Leadership Mastery (1-2 Credits)

This course addresses organizational challenges from the CEO or C- level perspective. At this level, the ability to engage ambiguity and

chaos effectively is essential. Creating strategy while using a systems approach and understanding how each functional area interacts with the other (with both the short-term and long-term in mind) are of very high importance. The course covers topics that consume the days of senior level leaders in organizations. This is typically registered as a one credit course except when a particular program's cirriculum allocates enough contact hours to all course topics to be covered at a more advanced level. Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.
